name: ORDINARY TIME 20 [C]

readings.citation:
Ps 40:2, 3, 4, 18. R. v.14b
Lord, come to my aid!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 40:2, 3, 4, 18. R. v.14b
Lord, come to my aid!

readings.summary: Keep your eyes fixed on Jesus.

My sheep hear my voice, says the Lord;
I know them, and they follow me.

antiphons.text:
With the Lord there is mercy;
in him is plentiful redemption.

I am the living bread that came down from heaven,
says the Lord. Whoever eats of this bread will live for ever.
